commands.review_summary:
The PR rewrites MSTeams file.download.info SharePoint/OneDrive downloadUrl values through the existing Graph shares helper and adds a focused regression test.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +33. Total +34 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main returns the raw Teams file.download.info downloadUrl while the sibling contentUrl path already rewrites shared links through Graph shares. I did not replay a live Teams tenant upload in this read-only review.
